title: Aged One's Exultation
description: A talisman depicting the exultation of the aging untouchable, whose head resembles a sprig of ripe grapes. Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity.

title: Ailment Talisman
description: A talisman depicting a soul taken by sickness. When certain ailments are triggered, this talisman grants resistance to the same ailment. When the weak were infected with the dreaded fly sickness, they perished well before the metamorphosis could take hold.

title: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman
description: A talisman composed of fletched and iron arrows. Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts.

title: Beloved Stardust
description: A talisman depicting a wizened hand gently gripping a glintstone. Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken. Count Ymir was known for his recitations.

title: Blade of Mercy
description: A thin, blood-stained dagger. No longer fit for use. Raises attack power after each critical hit. Hornsent employed this to honorably end the suffering of a compatriot. After claiming numerous lives, the dagger is now broken, but has acquired a spectral aura.

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
description: Talisman depicting the blessed boon that is a droplet of the blue, luminescent sap of the Erdtree. Gradually restores FP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever— but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith.

title: Boltdrake Talisman +3
description: Talisman depicting a yellow ancient dragon. Boosts lightning damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled before the prehistoric era of the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3
description: A medallion inlaid with a large cerulean amber. Boosts maximum FP. Medallions like these are a staple of those who practice sorcery or incantations.

title: Cerulean Seed Talisman +1
description: A talisman fashioned from a cerulean seed. Greatly boosts FP restoration from the Flask of Cerulean Tears. The cerulean seeds are said to be the crystallized tears of the Erdtree, shed in blessing for those who follow the way of the Two Fingers.

title: Clarifying Horn Charm +2
description: A charm shaped like an animal horn. Vastly raises focus. Horn charms are a long-standing tradition in the Lands Between, said to repel evil and ward off ailments of the mind.

title: Crimson Amber Medallion +3
description: A medallion inlaid with a large crimson amber. Boosts maximum HP. Medallions like these are a staple of adventurers who want to bolster their survivability.

title: Crimson Seed Talisman +1
description: A talisman fashioned from a crimson seed. Greatly boosts HP restoration from the Flask of Crimson Tears. The crimson seeds are said to be the crystallized tears of the Erdtree, shed in blessing for those who wander the Lands Between.

title: Crusade Insignia
description: A talisman depicting a raised spear on a backdrop of flames, in remembrance of the lives lost in the sacred crusade led by Messmer. Raises attack power after defeating an enemy. The warriors who fought in the crusade set aside both honor and mercy to wantonly impale and scorch those deemed impure.

title: Dried Bouquet
description: A dried bouquet of flowers. Raises attack power for a time when a summoned spirit ally perishes. The flowers' fragrance, now faded, once served to soothe the hearts of those lost in grief.

title: Enraged Divine Beast
description: A charm depicting the crazed, cavorting dance of the divine beast conducted at the tower festival. Raises potency of storms. Divine beasts are messengers of the heavens, and their rage mirrors the tumult of the skies, of which storms are the pinnacle.

title: Fine Crucible Feather Talisman
description: A talisman fashioned from thin feathers that embody the aspects of various creatures. Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Improves backsteps but increases damage taken at all times. Hornsent view the Crucible as sacred for the refinement wrought through its evolutionary gifts.

title: Flamedrake Talisman +3
description: Talisman depicting a red ancient dragon. Boosts fire damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.

title: Golden Braid
description: A braid of golden hair, cut loose. Queen Marika's offering to the Grandmother. Boosts holy damage negation by the utmost. What was her prayer? Her wish, her confession? There is no one left to answer, and Marika never returned home again.

title: Immunizing Horn Charm +2
description: A charm shaped like an animal horn. Vastly raises immunity. Horn charms are a long-standing tradition in the Lands Between, said to repel evil and ward off all manner of ailments.

title: Lacerating Crossed-Tree
description: Handicraft depicting a golden crossed-tree. One of the items conferred to the Needle Knights. Enhances dash attacks. Long ago, the Needle Knights were in service of Miquella, but now they are no more. Save for one.

title: Mottled Necklace +2
description: A necklace decorated with mottled stones. Vastly raises robustness, immunity, and focus. These stones are said to be the remnants of an ancient warrior who swallowed them to resist the ailments that plagued the battlefield.

title: Outer God Heirloom
description: A withered finger wearing a ring, said to belong to an outer god. Raises arcane. The outer gods are beings of immeasurable power that exist beyond the realm of the Erdtree, and their heirlooms are said to imbue the bearer with a fragment of their alien power.

title: Pearl Shield Talisman
description: A talisman in the shape of a pearlescent shield. Boosts all non-physical damage negation while guarding. The lustrous pearl surface deflects not just weapons, but also the mystical energies of sorceries and incantations.

title: Pearldrake Talisman +3
description: Talisman depicting a pearlescent ancient dragon. Boosts non-physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled before the prehistoric era of the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.

title: Rellana's Cameo
description: Talisman featuring a gallant portrait of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight. Enhances attacks executed after maintaining the same stance for a certain length of time. Engraved as a reminder of the unparalleled devotion of those who left their homelands to serve Rellana.

title: Retaliatory Crossed-Tree
description: Handicraft depicting a golden crossed-tree. One of the items conferred to the Needle Knights. Enhances attacks executed after rolling or backstepping. Long ago, the Needle Knights were in service of Miquella, but now they are no more. Save for one.

title: Sharpshot Talisman
description: A talisman fashioned in the shape of a focused eye. Boosts attack power of precision-aimed shots. Those who can strike with unerring accuracy are said to see the world differently—every vulnerability laid bare.

title: Shattered Stone Talisman
description: A talisman fashioned from a fragment of shattered stone. Raises potency of kicking and stomping skills. The stone was once part of a great golem, now long fallen, and carries within it the memory of tremendous force.

title: Smithing Talisman
description: A talisman depicting a blacksmith's hammer striking an anvil. Enhances weapon-throwing attacks. Smithscript weapons were developed by the smiths of the Hornsent, who devised methods of imbuing thrown weapons with devastating force.

title: Spelldrake Talisman +3
description: Talisman depicting a blue ancient dragon. Boosts magic damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled before the prehistoric era of the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.

title: St. Trina's Smile
description: A talisman depicting a smiling St. Trina, a vision conjured deep within a certain man's heart. Raises attack power when sleep is triggered in the vicinity. "Only I am allowed to know. Of your velvety sleep. Its sweetly gentle embrace. So please, smile—for me, and only me."

title: Stalwart Horn Charm +2
description: A charm shaped like an animal horn. Vastly raises robustness. Horn charms are a long-standing tradition in the Lands Between, said to repel evil and ward off all manner of ailments of the body.

title: Talisman of All Crucibles
description: A giant mass of intermingling Crucible attributes. Reduces damage taken from critical hits and head shots and improves the effectiveness of rolling and backstepping, but also increases damage taken at all times. Rumored to have sprouted upon giants and is known as the "mother of Crucibles" in ancient tower lore.

title: Talisman of Lord's Bestowal
description: A talisman depicting Godfrey, first Elden lord, receiving the precious sap. Increases poise after using a flask of tears. The Lord accepted the sap stoically, without any sign of wavering. No wonder Lord of the Erdtree casts a long shadow over the lands.

title: Talisman of the Dread
description: Talisman depicting the dread dragon of the jagged peak, whose roars cause the peak's molten fury to boil and churn. Raises potency of magma. Bayle was the foul dragon's name — a terrible harbinger of destruction whose challenge to the ancient Dragonlord ended in grievous mutual injury.

title: Two-Handed Sword Talisman
description: A talisman depicting a warrior two-handing a sword. Enhances attacks with two-handed weapons. The horned warriors were fitting figureheads for the military might of the tower they kept watch over, their deft attacks slashing through any and all foes.

title: Two-Headed Turtle Talisman
description: A talisman depicting a two-headed turtle. Greatly raises stamina recovery speed. The two-headed turtle is a symbol of endurance, said to carry the weight of the world upon its shell without faltering.

title: Verdigris Discus
description: A discus made of verdigris, the corroded metal known for its heft. Raises defense with higher equipment load. Great weight makes for great strength. The strength to protect others.

title: Viridian Amber Medallion +3
description: A medallion inlaid with a large viridian amber. Boosts maximum stamina. Medallions like these are favored by those who engage in prolonged combat, allowing them to sustain their efforts beyond ordinary limits.
